---
title: "Publications"
subtitle: "Papers, Grants, Service & Design Background"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: "papers_cover.png"
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Banner ── */
.quarto-title-banner {
  background-position: 50% 55%;
  height: 200px;
}
#quarto-document-content {
  margin-top: 0;
  padding-top: 0;
  max-width: 860px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  padding-left: 1.5rem;
  padding-right: 1.5rem;
}
#quarto-margin-sidebar { padding-top: 0; }

/* ── Section headings ── */
h2.section-heading {
  margin-top: 2.8rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.45rem;
  border-bottom: 2.5px solid #2563eb;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1e293b;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
h3.sub-heading {
  margin-top: 1.8rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #94a3b8;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* ── Publication entries ── */
.pub-entry {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1.1rem;
  padding: 1rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
}
.pub-entry:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

.pub-year {
  min-width: 2.5rem;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #94a3b8;
  padding-top: 0.25rem;
  text-align: right;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
}

.pub-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }

.pub-title {
  font-size: 0.97rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1e293b;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.pub-authors {
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  color: #64748b;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

.pub-authors strong {
  color: #1e293b;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.pub-venue {
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  color: #64748b;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}

.pub-venue em {
  color: #2563eb;
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.pub-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.1rem 0.45rem;
  border-radius: 3px;
  margin-right: 0.3rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.badge-review { background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; }
.badge-prep   { background: #ede9fe; color: #5b21b6; }
.badge-tech   { background: #f0fdf4; color: #166534; }

.pub-links { margin-top: 0.35rem; }
.pub-links a {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  padding: 0.18rem 0.55rem;
  border: 1px solid #2563eb;
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: #2563eb;
  text-decoration: none;
  margin-right: 0.35rem;
  transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
}
.pub-links a:hover {
  background: #2563eb;
  color: #fff;
}

/* ── Grant entries ── */
.grant-entry {
  padding: 0.85rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.grant-entry:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.grant-role {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #2563eb;
  margin-right: 0.3rem;
}
.grant-amount {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #059669;
  margin-left: 0.4rem;
}
.grant-period {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #94a3b8;
  margin-left: 0.3rem;
}

/* ── Service ── */
.service-block {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #374151;
  line-height: 1.7;
  padding: 0.5rem 0;
}
.service-label {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1e293b;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: #94a3b8;
}

/* ── Intro note ── */
.intro-note {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: #64748b;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.intro-note a { color: #2563eb; }

.scholar-stat {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #eff6ff;
  border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #1d4ed8;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-left: 0.5rem;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
</style>
```

<p class="intro-note">
For the most up-to-date list, see my <a href="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/ghrtsq5to79059lximk01/h?rlkey=cev0uzwgvu4jkus9eo6kkbgn7&dl=0">Curriculum Vitae</a> and <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=D3PSmFsAAAAJ">Google Scholar</a> profile.
<span class="scholar-stat">1,564 citations &nbsp;·&nbsp; Mar 2026</span>
</p>

## Publications {.section-heading}

### Peer-Reviewed Articles {.sub-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2026</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">MINGLE: VLMs for Semantically Complex Region Detection</div>
    <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Kudaeva, A., Cipriano, M., Al Ghannam, F., Tan, F., de Melo, G., &amp; Sevtsuk, A.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence</em>, 40(45).</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1609/aaai.v40i45.41239">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2026</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">Spatial Distribution of Foot Traffic in New York City and Applications for Urban Planning</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Sevtsuk, A., Basu, R., <strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Alhassan, A., &amp; Kollar, J.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>Nature Cities</em>, 1–10.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s44284-025-00383-y">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2026</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">Reconceptualising Regional Boundaries: Depicting Blurred Regions in China Through Individual Mobility Data</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Zhang, H., <strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Wang, P., &amp; Zhao, J.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>Computational Urban Science</em>, 6(1), 5.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s43762-026-00242-z">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2026</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">START: Spatial and Textual Learning for Chart Understanding</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Liu, Z., Gao, X., Niu, F., Gao, Q., <strong>Liu, L.</strong>, &amp; Piramuthu, R.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV)</em>.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.48550/arxiv.2512.07186">arXiv</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2026</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">Decoding Human Safety Perception with Eye-Tracking Systems, Street View Images, and Explainable AI</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Kang, Y., Chen, J., <strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Sharma, K., Mazzarello, M., Mora, S., Duarte, F., &amp; Ratti, C.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>Computers, Environment and Urban Systems</em>, 123, 102356.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.compenvurbsys.2025.102356">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2025</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">A Sidewalk-Level Urban Heat Risk Assessment Framework Using Pedestrian Mobility and Urban Microclimate Modeling</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Colaninno, N., Basu, R., Hosseini, M., Alhassan, A., <strong>Liu, L.</strong>, &amp; Sevtsuk, A.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science</em>, 52(5), 1071–1090.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083241280746">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2024</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">Clarity or Confusion: A Review of Computer Vision Street Attributes in Urban Studies and Planning</div>
    <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Liu, L.</strong>, &amp; Sevtsuk, A.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>Cities</em>, 150, 105022.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cities.2024.105022">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2022</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">An Urban Infrastructure Assessment System Built on Geo-Tagged Images and Machine Learning</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Zhang, D., Yi, H., Chen, Y., Jiang, N., Shao, J., &amp; <strong>Liu, L.</strong></div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>Computational Urban Science</em>, 2(1), 1–21.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s43762-022-00056-9">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2020</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">The Spatial-Temporal Dynamics of Daily Intercity Mobility in the Yangtze River Delta: An Analysis Using Big Data</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Cui, C., Wu, X., <strong>Liu, L.</strong>, &amp; Zhang, W.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>Habitat International</em>, 106, 102174.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.habitatint.2020.102174">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2018</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">Measuring Human Perceptions of a Large-Scale Urban Region Using Machine Learning</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Zhang, F., Zhou, B., <strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Liu, Y., Fung, H., Lin, H., &amp; Ratti, C.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>Landscape and Urban Planning</em>, 180, 148–160.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.landurbplan.2018.08.020">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2018</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">STREETALK: A Navigation System for Pedestrians and Cyclists</div>
    <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Zhang, F., Zhou, B., Wang, Z., &amp; Li, Y.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>Landscape Architecture Frontiers</em>, 6(2), 94–101.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.15302/j-laf-20180210">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2017</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">How Green Are the Streets? An Analysis for Central Areas of Chinese Cities Using Tencent Street View</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Long, Y., &amp; <strong>Liu, L.</strong></div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>PLOS ONE</em>, 12(2), e0171110.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0171110">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2016</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">C-IMAGE: City Cognitive Mapping through Geo-Tagged Photos</div>
    <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Zhou, B., Zhao, J., &amp; Ryan, B. D.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>GeoJournal</em>, 81(6), 817–861.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s10708-016-9739-6">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2014</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">Recognizing City Identity via Attribute Analysis of Geo-Tagged Images</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Zhou, B., <strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Oliva, A., &amp; Torralba, A.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV)</em>, 519–534.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-319-10578-9_34">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Book Chapters {.sub-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2018</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">The Recognition of CAZ in Shanghai Based on Evaluated POI</div>
    <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Liu, L.</strong>, &amp; Liu, Z.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>Big Data Support of Urban Planning and Management: The Experience in China</em>, 99–112.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-319-51929-6_6">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Manuscripts Under Review {.sub-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2026</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">Sidewalk Occupancy Prediction via 2D-3D Consistency Learning with Pseudo Labels</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Ma, Y., Lin, J., <strong>Liu, L.</strong>, He, H., Ricketts, L., Squicciarini, B., Liu, Y., &amp; Zhou, B.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><span class="pub-badge badge-review">Under Review</span> Submitted to the <em>European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV)</em>.</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Manuscripts in Preparation {.sub-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2026</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">Where Pedestrians Interact: Mapping Street-Level Sociability across U.S. Cities</div>
    <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Liu, L.</strong>, &amp; Sevtsuk, A.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><span class="pub-badge badge-prep">In Preparation</span></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2026</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">Are Richer Visual Representations Always More Human-Aligned in Urban Experience?</div>
    <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Tan, F., &amp; Duarte, F.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><span class="pub-badge badge-prep">In Preparation</span></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Technical Reports & Benchmark Papers {.sub-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2025</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">Exploring the Challenges of Humanity's Last Exam</div>
    <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Gao, X., Gao, Q., &amp; Piramuthu, R.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><span class="pub-badge badge-tech">Technical Report</span> Applied Scientist PhD Internship, Amazon AGI, Sunnyvale, CA.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/8eshq8b80b9mmp4c19ukt/Exploring_the_Challenges_of_Humanity_s_Last_Exam.pdf?rlkey=qgvc22lbsc78j86apggtklqpv&st=lvqor1f4&dl=0">View upon request</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2024</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">ABCxM: A Benchmark for Multimodal Models Playing Scores to Music</div>
    <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Gao, X., Gao, Q., &amp; Piramuthu, R.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><span class="pub-badge badge-tech">Technical Report</span> Applied Scientist PhD Internship, Amazon AGI, Sunnyvale, CA.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/07pv6n5h6n8c784nlh4k3/liu-liu_1.pdf?rlkey=sf34mrgrm85cz0wq557vgqq4a&st=jznjgqwt&dl=0">View upon request</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2024</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">VIS: A Benchmark for Foley Models and Visually Indicative Sounds</div>
    <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Gao, X., Gao, Q., &amp; Piramuthu, R.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><span class="pub-badge badge-tech">Technical Report</span> Applied Scientist PhD Internship, Amazon AGI, Sunnyvale, CA.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/6idfzeoj59iff4g8wxi69/liu-liu_2.pdf?rlkey=orjuocbjjipuzqjjg6d8ys7yu&st=f6ah28z6&dl=0">View upon request</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2024</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">ELSA: Evaluating Localization of Social Activities in Urban Streets</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Hosseini, M., Cipriano, M., Eslami, S., Hodczak, D., <strong>Liu, L.</strong>, Sevtsuk, A., &amp; de Melo, G.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>arXiv</em> preprint.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.48550/arxiv.2406.01551">arXiv</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
  <div class="pub-year">2020</div>
  <div class="pub-body">
    <div class="pub-title">Assessing Physical Environment of TOD Communities around Metro Stations: Using Big Data and Machine Learning</div>
    <div class="pub-authors">Fang, W., <strong>Liu, L.</strong>, &amp; Zhou, J.</div>
    <div class="pub-venue"><em>World Bank</em>, Washington, DC.</div>
    <div class="pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1596/33343">DOI</a></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

*Additional papers written in Chinese are listed in the [Curriculum Vitae](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/ghrtsq5to79059lximk01/h?rlkey=cev0uzwgvu4jkus9eo6kkbgn7&dl=0) only.*

---

## Grants & Funding {.section-heading}

### Research Grants {.sub-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="grant-entry">
  <span class="grant-role">Principal Investigator</span>
  "Observing the 'Sidewalk Ballet': Leveraging LMMs to Detect Social Interactions in Large-Scale Urban Imagery Datasets" (CIS250088), Advanced Cyberinfrastructure Coordination Ecosystem: Services &amp; Support (ACCESS), Alexandria, VA.
  <span class="grant-amount">~$140,000</span>
  <span class="grant-period">Jan 2025 – Jan 2027</span>
</div>

<div class="grant-entry">
  <span class="grant-role">Subproject Principal Investigator</span>
  National Key Research and Development Program of China — "Multi-dimensional Street Quality Enhancement and Coordinated Control Technology Platform Construction" (Project No. 2023YFC3805305-03).
  <span class="grant-amount">RMB 1,000,000</span>
  <span class="grant-period">Dec 2023 – Nov 2026</span>
</div>

<div class="grant-entry">
  <span class="grant-role">Co-Principal Investigator</span>
  "Moments: Leveraging Continuous Visual and Auditory Experiences to Assess Urban Attraction" (CIS250360), Advanced Cyberinfrastructure Coordination Ecosystem: Services &amp; Support (ACCESS), Alexandria, VA.
  <span class="grant-amount">~$11,000</span>
  <span class="grant-period">Oct 2025 – Oct 2026</span>
</div>
```

### Internal Grants {.sub-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="grant-entry">
  <span class="grant-role">OGE Conference Grant</span>, Office of Graduate Education, MIT.
  <span class="grant-amount">$1,000</span>
  <span class="grant-period">2025</span>
</div>

<div class="grant-entry">
  <span class="grant-role">Graduate Student Career Exploration Grant</span>, Career Advising &amp; Professional Development (CAPD), MIT.
  <span class="grant-amount">$1,500</span>
  <span class="grant-period">2025</span>
</div>
```

---

## Academic Service {.section-heading}

### Journal Reviewer {.sub-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="service-block">
  <em>Cities</em>, <em>Nature Cities</em>, <em>Sustainable Cities and Society</em>, <em>Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science</em>, <em>Journal of Transport and Land Use</em>, <em>Transactions in Urban Data, Science, and Technology</em>, <em>Annals of the American Association of Geographers</em>, <em>Computational Urban Science</em>, <em>Landscape and Urban Planning</em>, <em>International Journal of Digital Earth</em>, and others (20+ reviews).
</div>
```

### Committee & Other {.sub-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="service-block">
  <span class="service-label">Committee Member</span>
  Urban Imagery Committee, Urban Planning Society of China (UPSC)
</div>

<div class="service-block">
  <span class="service-label">Listed Expert</span>
  Shanghai Science and Technology Talent Expert Database
</div>

<div class="service-block">
  <span class="service-label">Mentorship</span>
  Peer Application Support (PASS) — supporting diversity in graduate admissions, MIT (2022, 2023, 2024)
</div>
```

---

## Design Portfolio {.section-heading}

```{=html}
<div style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #374151; line-height: 1.75; padding: 0.75rem 0;">
  A collection of architectural and urban design work from my undergraduate years at Tongji University (2008–2011), spanning city redevelopment, regulatory planning, structural design, and community architecture.
</div>

<div style="margin-top: 0.75rem;">
  <a href="../portfolio/index.html"
     style="display: inline-block; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
            background: #1e293b; color: #fff; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none;">
    View Portfolio →
  </a>
  <span style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-left: 0.8rem;">
    PDF version available upon request
  </span>
</div>
```
